FAILUsers can be listedConnectAs a Posit Team administratorsrc/vip_tests/connect/test_users.py::test_list_users0.30sTest procedureGiven Connect is accessible at the configured URLWhen I list all usersThen the user list is not emptyAnd the test user exists in the user listError tracebackCopyfixturefunc = <function check_test_user_in_list at 0x7f383aa83b00>
request = <FixtureRequest for <Function test_list_users>>
kwargs = {'test_username': 'testuser', 'user_list': [{'active_time': '2026-04-30T00:38:10Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-04-30T00:36:26Z', 'email': '', ...}]}

    def call_fixture_func(
        fixturefunc: _FixtureFunc[FixtureValue], request: FixtureRequest, kwargs
    ) -> FixtureValue:
        if inspect.isgeneratorfunction(fixturefunc):
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., Generator[FixtureValue]], fixturefunc)
            generator = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
            try:
                fixture_result = next(generator)
            except StopIteration:
                raise ValueError(f"{request.fixturename} did not yield a value") from None
            finalizer = functools.partial(_teardown_yield_fixture, fixturefunc, generator)
            request.addfinalizer(finalizer)
        else:
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., FixtureValue], fixturefunc)
>           fixture_result = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
                             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

.venv/lib/python3.13/site-packages/_pytest/fixtures.py:915: 
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _

test_username = 'testuser'

    @then("the test user exists in the user list")
    def check_test_user_in_list(user_list, test_username):
        usernames = [u.get("username") for u in user_list]
>       assert test_username in usernames, (
            f"Test user {test_username!r} not found in user list: {usernames}"
        )
E       AssertionError: Test user 'testuser' not found in user list: ['__bootstrap_admin__']
E       assert 'testuser' in ['__bootstrap_admin__']

2026/04/30 00:39:44.869225856 width, height, onefile, family, title, fonts, version, paper,
2026/04/30 00:39:44.869256992 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,

2026/04/30 00:39:44.869277283 {
2026/04/30 00:39:44.869277744 initPSandPDFfonts()
2026/04/30 00:39:44.869286377 new <- list()
2026/04/30 00:39:44.869286897 if (!missing(width))

2026/04/30 00:39:44.869383993 new$paper <- paper
2026/04/30 00:39:44.869384494 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/04/30 00:39:44.869393607 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/04/30 00:39:44.869394038 if (!missing(bg))
2026/04/30 00:39:44.869447077 new$bg <- bg
2026/04/30 00:39:44.869447939 if (!missing(fg))
2026/04/30 00:39:44.869460047 new$fg <- fg
2026/04/30 00:39:44.869460578 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/04/30 00:39:44.869469912 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/04/30 00:39:44.869470372 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/04/30 00:39:44.869479987 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/04/30 00:39:44.869480427 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/04/30 00:39:44.869508299 new$colormodel <- colormodel

2026/04/30 00:39:44.869536301 if (!missing(useKerning))

2026/04/30 00:39:44.869546777 if (!missing(fillOddEven))

2026/04/30 00:39:44.869557213 if (!missing(compress))
2026/04/30 00:39:44.869566777 new$compress <- compress
2026/04/30 00:39:44.869567248 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/04/30 00:39:44.869642280 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/04/30 00:39:44.869643312 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {

2026/04/30 00:39:44.869655350 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/04/30 00:39:44.869670983 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/04/30 00:39:44.869671684 "default"))
2026/04/30 00:39:44.869691769 old$encoding <- enc
2026/04/30 00:39:44.869692931 family <- family$metrics
2026/04/30 00:39:44.869711148 }
2026/04/30 00:39:44.869714283 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")

2026/04/30 00:39:44.869731028 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/04/30 00:39:44.869741704 if (length(family) == 4L) {

2026/04/30 00:39:44.869768469 }
2026/04/30 00:39:44.869783702 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/04/30 00:39:44.869793952 }
2026/04/30 00:39:44.869794713 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/04/30 00:39:44.869817898 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]

2026/04/30 00:39:44.869835830 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/04/30 00:39:44.869881689 domain = NA)
2026/04/30 00:39:44.869889511 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/04/30 00:39:44.869890452 }
2026/04/30 00:39:44.869904032 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/04/30 00:39:44.869904483 old$family <- family
2026/04/30 00:39:44.869914528 }

2026/04/30 00:39:44.869961198 else stop("invalid PDF version")

2026/04/30 00:39:44.869983872 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
